documentation.text:
@title  CompetitionRegistry
 @notice On-chain registration for the AlphaTrade autonomous-trading
         competition (Track 1, BNB Chain).
         Each participant registers the wallet address its agent will trade
         from. The set of registered addresses forms an immutable, append-only
         participant list — no entry can ever be removed or altered, and no
         privileged role can mutate it. Registration is only accepted before
         the trading window opens; the deadline is fixed at deploy time and
         cannot be changed.
         Self-custody: the canonical path is {register}, where the agent wallet
         signs and submits its own registration transaction (msg.sender is the
         agent). {registerAgent} is provided for operator/relayer submission
         and records which operator submitted, but the registered identity is
         always the agent address itself.
         There is no owner, no admin, no upgrade path, and no funds held.

@notice Unix timestamp at which the trading window opens. Registrations
         submitted at or after this time are rejected. Immutable.
@notice Append-only list of registered agent wallet addresses.
@notice agent address => 1-based registration index (0 means not set).

@param _registrationDeadline Unix timestamp when the trading window opens.
        Must be in the future at deploy time.

@notice Register the caller as a competing agent (self-custodial path).
         The agent wallet signs and submits this transaction itself.
@notice True while registrations are still being accepted.
@notice Seconds remaining until the deadline (0 once closed).
@notice Agent address at a given 0-based index.
@notice The agent's 0-based registration index. Reverts if not registered.

s"}],"name":"registerAgent","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"registrationDeadline","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"registrationOpen","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"timeUntilDeadline","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"events":{"AgentRegistered(address,address,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"agent":"The registered agent wallet address.","index":"The agent's 0-based position in the participant list.","operator":"The msg.sender that submitted the tx (== agent for {register}).","timestamp":"Block timestamp of registration."}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"constructor":{"params":{"_registrationDeadline":"Unix timestamp when the trading window opens.        Must be in the future at deploy time."}},"registerAgent(address)":{"params":{"agent":"The agent wallet address to register."}}},"title":"CompetitionRegistry","version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"AgentRegistered(address,address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted once per agent when it joins the participant list."}},"kind":"user","methods":{"getParticipants()":{"notice":"The full, immutable participant list."},"indexOf(address)":{"notice":"The agent's 0-based registration index. Reverts if not registered."},"isRegistered(address)":{"notice":"agent address => has registered."},"participantAt(uint256)":{"notice":"Agent address at a given 0-based index."},"participantCount()":{"notice":"Number of registered agents."},"register()":{"notice":"Register the caller as a competing agent (self-custodial path).         The agent wallet signs and submits this transaction itself."},"registerAgent(address)":{"notice":"Register a specific agent wallet address. Useful when an operator         or relayer (e.g. the TWAK CLI / MCP action) submits on the agent's         behalf. The registered identity is always `agent`, and the         submitting `msg.sender` is recorded as the operator in the event."},"registrationDeadline()":{"notice":"Unix timestamp at which the trading window opens. Registrations         submitted at or after this time are rejected. Immutable."},"registrationOpen()":{"notice":"True while registrations are still being accepted."},"timeUntilDeadline()":{"notice":"Seconds remaining until the deadline (0 once closed)."}},"notice":"On-chain registration for the AlphaTrade autonomous-trading         competition (Track 1, BNB Chain).         Each participant registers the wallet address its agent will trade         from. The set of registered addresses forms an immutable, append-only         participant list \u2014 no entry can ever be removed or altered, and no         privileged role can mutate it. Registration is only accepted before         the trading window opens; the deadline is fixed at deploy time and         cannot be changed.         Self-custody: the canonical path is {register}, where the agent wallet         signs and submits its own registration transaction (msg.sender is the         agent). {registerAgent} is provided for operator/relayer submission         and records which operator submitted, but the registered identity is         always the agent address itself.         There is no owner, no admin, no upgrade path, and no funds held.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/CompetitionRegistry.sol":"CompetitionRegistry"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/CompetitionRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0x1ea42ece8fc62a19112855aba212502f51a514b4db5e8a373d5ace51653cb7b3","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9a04ccd133937cd821e89348a880e2ac2e710e6ab41985648df6b1bffd99428c","dweb:/ipfs/QmQV9dnVxcXZNZCsbK2A3X7bcveKZAuS24wkYTfofRfVSQ"]}},"version":1}
